expected: Every panel includes an OpenAI Image prompt block.
The guide includes a run-level OpenAI panel execution brief.
Lettering remains separated from image generation prompts.
forbidden: Provider-specific prompt blocks missing from any panel.
Visible text instructions embedded directly in the image prompt.
Run-level instructions that permit live research or new clinical claims.
graderNotes: Rendering guide quality should prove the run is ready for manual panel retries and reviewer prompt inspection.

expected: The execution brief tells the model to keep one final image per panel.
Prompt guidance forbids live research and requires use of supplied panel content.
Clinically material panels keep claim references and continuity anchors.
forbidden: Missing claim references on clinically important panels.
No continuity reference instruction for later panels.
Prompt instructions that bake lettering directly into the generated art.
graderNotes: The guide is secondary, but it still needs to be strong enough for manual rerenders and QA.

expected: Rendering guide records Image2 guidance pack version IDs and source provenance.
Each OpenAI image prompt preserves panel-card order including core frozen moment, medical constraints, negative constraints, and final output requirements.
Visual reference pack and panel prompts use stable reference item IDs.
forbidden: Rendering guide with no guidance provenance.
Prompt block compiled from raw story prose only.
Visible educational text baked into image prompt.
graderNotes: The Image2 playbook must shape prompt compilation and review gates.

expected: Agent-built disease runs carry the approved medical dossier id into render prompts, rendering guide, and visual reference pack.
Rendering guide quality fails when prompt artifacts were built from an older or unapproved dossier.
The guide provenance identifies the medical dossier review decision used before story and panel generation.
forbidden: Rendering guide detached from medical dossier approval.
Render prompts missing agent-run or medical-dossier lineage.
Visual reference pack generated from a different dossier than the guide.
graderNotes: The rendering guide is not ready for gpt-image-2 panel generation unless it can prove the story and prompts came from the approved medical dossier.
